description_long: This is a round, golden-brown hamburger bun generously sprinkled with white and light brown sesame seeds across its domed top surface. The bun has a soft, slightly matte appearance with a gentle rise and a smooth, even curvature. The sides of the bun are less densely covered with seeds, revealing more of the plain, lightly browned bread. There are no visible fillings, patty, or toppings protruding from the sides, suggesting the bun is either closed or empty. The texture appears soft and airy, typical of a fresh bakery bun, with a subtle sheen from the baking process. No packaging or additional elements are present around the bun.
description: A round, golden-brown sesame seed hamburger bun with a domed, soft appearance and no visible fillings or packaging.
description_view_0: The top of the bun is fully visible, showing a dense, even distribution of sesame seeds and a smooth, rounded dome.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the gentle slope of the bun and shows a moderate coverage of sesame seeds, with more plain bread visible near the base.
description_view_2: The back view reveals a slightly less dense sesame seed distribution and a smooth, unbroken bread surface.
description_view_3: Another side view with a similar seed pattern, showing the bun's rounded shape and soft, matte texture.
attribute_topping_arrangement: No toppings such as lettuce, tomato, cheese, onions, or pickles are visible; only the top of the bun with sesame seeds is seen.
